hero.title: Intelligent AI employees for every area.
hero.description: From voice agents to chatbots, sales and custom automations — every solution is built bespoke and fully integrated into your existing workflows.

list.title: Seven ways to take work off your plate.

items.name: AI Voice Agents
items.summary: Intelligent phone assistants that answer every call around the clock — so no appointment and no customer is ever lost again. They work like real employees, built for any industry.

items.name: AI Chatbots
items.summary: Modern AI chatbots for websites, apps or internal systems that advise, sell and support.

items.name: Social Media AI
items.summary: AI agents that run your social channels and automate the busywork.

items.name: Sales & Outreach Agents
items.summary: AI agents that find, score and prepare outreach to potential customers — fully automated.

items.name: Automations
items.summary: We automate almost any digital business process and connect your tools into smooth workflows.

items.name: Custom AI Agents
items.summary: For special cases we build fully bespoke solutions. We assess what's possible together — there are almost no limits.

items.name: Websites & Digital Presence
items.summary: Modern company websites and landing pages, perfectly aligned with your AI automations.

philosophy.headline: We build digital employees.
philosophy.body: Our AI agents take over repetitive tasks, support existing teams and free up time for what really matters. Every solution is planned individually and tailored precisely to your processes — with the goal of making your business more successful for the long term.

items.q: How quickly is an AI agent ready?
items.a: Typically we build a working first version within 2–4 weeks — tested against your real workflows before it goes live.

items.q: Can the agent work with our existing systems?
items.a: Yes. We integrate your agents seamlessly with your phone system, CRM, calendar, email and almost any other tool via APIs.
Yes. Data protection, access control and traceability are built into every solution — with EU data residency on request.

items.q: What if we have a very specific requirement?
items.a: Then we assess technical feasibility together and, where it makes sense, build a fully bespoke AI agent. There are almost no fixed limits.

items.q: What does an AI agent cost?
items.a: It depends on scope. You'll find our engagement models on the pricing page — from a focused start to a long-term partnership.
